definition.en: As you create physical matter constantly without knowing that you do so, so also you create constantly a dream universe, and this dream universe is as individual as your environment in the physical world.
definition.zh: 正如你不断地创造物质实相而自己并不知道，你也同样不断地创造一个梦宇宙，而这个梦宇宙和你在物质世界中的环境一样具有个体性。

definition.en: I have mentioned that what I call the dream universe is indeed composed of molecular structure, and that it is a continuing reality, even though your own awareness of it is most usually limited, for quite necessary reasons, to the hours of your own sleep.
definition.zh: 我曾提到，我所谓的梦宇宙确实由分子结构组成，它是一个持续不断的实相，尽管出于相当必要的理由，你对它的觉知通常仅限于你睡眠的时段。

definition.en: I have mentioned before that in its own way the dream universe is as permanent as the physical universe. Basically its structure is somewhat the same, in that it is composed of atoms and molecules. These particles however simply exist within a different perspective.
definition.zh: 我以前提到过，梦宇宙以其自身的方式与物质宇宙同样恒久。基本上它的结构有些类似，因为它由原子和分子组成。然而，这些粒子只是存在于一个不同的视角中。

definition.en: The dream universe is as permanent in its way as the physical universe. You construct dreams whether you wake or you sleep. You are only familiar with your dreams when you sleep, for then your perception and your energy is focused in that direction.
definition.zh: 梦宇宙以其自身的方式与物质宇宙同样恒久。无论你醒着还是睡着，你都在构建梦。你只在睡眠时才熟悉你的梦，因为那时你的感知和能量聚焦在那个方向。

definition.en: It goes without saying that the dream universe is every bit as real to the inner self as the physical universe is to the conscious egotistical self.
definition.zh: 不言而喻，梦宇宙对内在自性的真实性，丝毫不亚于物质宇宙对意识自我（自我本位）的真实性。

explanation: 梦宇宙是与物理宇宙同时存在、同等真实的独立现实。它由分子结构构成，但存在于不同的感知视角中。你每夜做梦时并非只是想象，而是在实际创造这个宇宙——就像你不知不觉地创造物理物质一样。两个宇宙相互依存：你为梦宇宙提供持续能量，同时从中汲取自身活力。梦宇宙中的体验与清醒时的体验同样生动、有效且真实。在梦宇宙中，时空以清醒状态无法企及的方式运作——时间不再是连续性的要素，行动更自发、更流动。你无法停止已经创造的梦境体验，它一旦开始就持续存在并不断衍生新构造。两个宇宙总体平行发展，但并非完全同步：某个概念可能在梦宇宙中鲜活却未在物理世界表达，反之亦然。梦宇宙渗透许多其他场域，自我可以在其中轻松转换焦点，

quotes.text: We shall look in from the other side, for there is a looking-in also from the other side. I have mentioned before that beneath camouflage the fifth dimension is truly transparent. I have said that dream universe data has its effect upon your universe, as your universe has its effect upon the dream universe. It is also true that the dream universe is at least as familiar with your own universe as you are familiar with it; and as you tune in on it, so to speak, and while you are necessary for its survival, creating it, so does the dream universe tune in on you. So is your survival dependent upon its survival, and so does it create you as a by-product, if you are looking at your universe from the other side.
quotes.translation: 我们将从另一侧向内观看，因为从另一侧也有向内观看。我之前提过，在伪装之下，第五维度确实是透明的。我曾说过，梦宇宙的数据对你的宇宙产生影响，正如你的宇宙对梦宇宙产生影响一样。同样真实的是，梦宇宙至少像你熟悉你的宇宙一样熟悉你的宇宙；当你调频进入它时，可以说，在你为它的存续所必需、创造它的同时，梦宇宙也在调频进入你。因此，你的存续依赖于它的存续，而从另一侧看你的宇宙时，它也将你创造为副产品。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As you create physical matter constantly without knowing that you do so, so also you create constantly a dream universe, and this dream universe is as individual as your environment in the physical world. There is also a chemical reaction here, for without dreaming the physical organism could not exist. With your outer senses, you perceive but the camouflage physical reality which the physical senses are equipped to perceive. In the dream universe you are however free, and familiar, with both space and time in a manner which is denied you in the waking state. Where indeed are your dream locations? Where in space is the street upon which you walk in a dream?
quotes.translation: 正如你不断创造物质实相却不知自己正在这样做，你也不断创造一个梦宇宙，这个梦宇宙就像你在物质世界中的环境一样独特。这里也存在化学反应，因为没有做梦，物质有机体就无法存在。用你的外在感官，你只能感知到物质感官被设计来感知的伪装物质实相。然而，在梦宇宙中，你以清醒状态下被剥夺的方式，自由而熟悉地运用空间与时间。你的梦境地点究竟在哪里？你在梦中行走的那条街道，在空间中位于何处？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I have mentioned that what I call the dream universe is indeed composed of molecular structure, and that it is a continuing reality, even though your own awareness of it is most usually limited, for quite necessary reasons, to the hours of your own sleep. There is a give and take here, for if you give the dream universe much of its continuing energy, much of your own energy is derived from it. There is, between the physical field and the dream universe, an interdependence that is not at all unusual, for all fields are indeed dependent one upon the other.
quotes.translation: 我曾提到，我所谓的梦宇宙确实由分子结构组成，它是一个持续存在的实相，尽管出于相当必要的原因，你对它的觉知通常仅限于睡眠时间。这里存在一种给予与索取的关系：如果你为梦宇宙提供了它持续能量的大部分，那么你自己的许多能量也源自于它。在物质场域与梦宇宙之间，存在着一种毫不异常的相互依存关系，因为所有场域确实彼此依赖。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I have told you that you create your dreams, in actuality, not in theory alone. You create an actuality, a dream universe, as real as the physical universe. It simply cannot be directly perceived within the physical universe. There is always interaction. You can perceive the dream experience, you can receive its particular intensities, because you have created the dream experience within the universe of those intensities. But the dream universe and the dream experience, like thoughts and emotions, are independent of you in existence. You influence the dream universe but you cannot stop a dream experience after you have created it, and you must create it within the small range of intensities available for its existence, for there are no other conditions or agreeable ranges of intensity within which the dream experience can exist.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你，你创造你的梦境，这并非仅是理论上的说法，而是实际上的创造。你创造了一个实相，一个梦宇宙，它与物质宇宙同样真实。它只是无法在物质宇宙中被直接感知。两者之间始终存在互动。你可以感知梦的经验，可以接收它特定的强度，因为你是在那些强度的宇宙中创造了梦的经验。但梦宇宙和梦经验，如同思想和情感一样，在存在上独立于你。你影响梦宇宙，但一旦创造了梦经验，你就无法停止它，而且你必须在可供其存在的有限强度范围内创造它，因为没有其他条件或可接受的强度范围能让梦经验存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: With his intellectual appreciation of the benefits of fire that followed his physical mastery of it, then his dream universe became enriched with a new freedom. This is but one simple example. While development of the two universes overall is parallel, no exact evenness in all respects is achieved. That is, a concept may be brilliantly alive in the dream universe but unexpressed physically, or for one reason or another an intellectual comprehension in the physical universe may not find expression in the dream universe. But overall there is parallel development.
quotes.translation: 当人类在物理上掌握火之后，又对其益处有了智性上的理解，于是他的梦宇宙便因新的自由而变得丰富。这只是一个简单的例子。虽然两个宇宙的整体发展是平行的，但在所有方面并非完全一致。也就是说，一个概念可能在梦宇宙中生机勃勃，却未在物质层面表达出来；或者出于某种原因，物质宇宙中的智性理解可能未在梦宇宙中找到表达。但总体而言，发展是平行的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is a delicate connection here with the dream universe that is somewhat difficult to explain. The dream universe, however, pervades many other fields. It does not exist outside or apart from your own universe, but simultaneously with it. It appears, and is a reality, to all aspects or portions of the self, and often it is only within the dream universe that the personality can change focus easily or efficiently enough so that he can perceive the variety of roles that he himself has played.
quotes.translation: 这里与梦宇宙存在一种微妙的联系，这有些难以解释。然而，梦宇宙渗透了许多其他领域。它并非存在于你的宇宙之外或与之分离，而是与之同时存在。它对自我的所有面向或部分显现，且是一个实相，往往只有在梦宇宙中，人格才能足够轻松或有效地转换焦点，从而感知到他自己所扮演的各种角色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I have mentioned before that in its own way the dream universe is as permanent as the physical universe. Basically its structure is somewhat the same, in that it is composed of atoms and molecules. These particles however simply exist within a different perspective. The inner logic is much more consistent within the dream universe, and action is permitted greater freedom in several important respects.
quotes.translation: 我曾提过，梦宇宙就其本身而言，与物质宇宙同样恒久。其基本结构在某种程度上相似，皆由原子与分子构成。然而这些粒子仅存在于不同的视角中。梦宇宙的内在逻辑更为连贯一致，且在数个重要层面允许行动享有更大自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: A study of the correlations with their distortive effect would seem to yield entirely different data. Only an observer from without the three-field system of universes could judge that one action, and not three, had occurred. It will be simplest to discuss at first such correlations occurring within the dream universe, and the universe of matter, since the dream universe is closest to you in both psychic and electromagnetic terms.
quotes.translation: 研究这些具有扭曲效应的关联性，似乎会得出截然不同的数据。唯有置身于三场域宇宙系统之外的观察者，才能判定单一行动而非三重行动已然发生。最简便的讨论方式，是先从梦宇宙与物质宇宙中此类关联性着手，因为无论在心灵层面还是电磁层面，梦宇宙都与你最为贴近。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The energy is then transformed in the dream universe, and again regenerated and used in the formation of the universe of negative matter, into which it seeps from the dream universe. Our discussions will have to thoroughly discuss the nature of the dream universe before we can hope to consider the universe of negative matter, but it will not hurt if you keep the above mentioned facts in mind.
quotes.translation: 能量随后在梦宇宙中转化，再度重组并用于形成负物质宇宙——它从梦宇宙渗入其中。在我们能探讨负物质宇宙之前，必须彻底讨论梦宇宙的本质，但若你能牢记上述事实，亦无妨害。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The ego cannot make your heart beat. Why then do you find it difficult to believe that you are more than the ego, for in dreams you meet portions of yourself. You construct realities, and you are indeed familiar with the dream universe that consciously you ignore. And your experience within the dream universe is as vivid and as valid and as real, in every respect, as your waking experience.
quotes.translation: 自我无法让心脏跳动。那么为何你难以相信自己远不止是自我？因为在梦中你遇见自身的诸多部分。你构建实相，并且确实熟悉那个被意识忽略的梦境宇宙。你在梦境宇宙中的体验，在各方面都如清醒体验般生动、有效且真实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We come here also to one of the other causes of the dreaming state, beside those of which we have spoken in the past. The mind, of itself and separated from the ego, must still be action, and therefore never still. Since action of any kind, being composed of inner vitality, must seek materialization, the dreams become the constructions of that dream universe of which, again, we have spoken. But action can never complete itself. The dream once begun continues, and the dream universe itself forms anew other constructions.
quotes.translation: 此处我们触及梦境状态的另一成因，超越过去已讨论过的那些。心灵本身，当脱离自我而独立存在时，仍必须是行动，因此永不停歇。由于任何形式的行动都由内在活力构成，必然寻求物质化，梦境便成为那个我们曾提及的梦境宇宙的构建。但行动永远无法完成自身。一旦开始的梦境持续延展，梦境宇宙本身又形成新的构建。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is no particular boundary to the circle. It widens outward indefinitely. Now. In the dream universe, in all systems of such nature, development is achieved not by traveling your single line, but by delving into that point that you call a moment. The physical laws simply do not apply here, within such a value fulfillment system. Basically your own physical universe is at the apex of such a system itself, and it is only because of the purpose and nature of the particular apex that experience appears, from my viewpoint, to be so slowed down. The particular point, in one manner, is being pursued by you in such a slow fashion that it appears to be a series of happenings strung out in a thread of continuity. You experience action as one happening after another, not because of the nature of action itself but because of the nature of your own structure and perception.
quotes.translation: 这个圆没有特定边界。它无限向外扩展。现在。在梦境宇宙中，在所有此类性质的系统里，发展并非通过沿着你那条单一线条行进，而是通过深入探索你称之为"当下"的那个点来实现。物理法则在此类价值完成系统中根本不适用。从我的视角看，你的物质宇宙本质上正是这类系统的顶点，只因这个特定顶点的目的与本质，才使经验显得如此缓慢。从某种角度而言，你正以如此缓慢的方式追寻那个特定点，以至于它呈现为一系列串连在连续线上的事件。你将行动体验为接连发生的事件，这并非源于行动本身的本质，而是源于你自身结构与感知的特性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You cannot probe into the one system without affecting the others. It is basically meaningless to consider the personality as separate from the simultaneous actions of which it is composed. The personality, as you know, has also a reality within the dream universe. It should be obvious that in a most basic and practical manner the personality however is not involved with physical time to any degree. Only a part of the personality, the ego, is so involved. It is obvious of course that the personality system will react to stimuli that seem, to the ego, to be far divorced in time. That is, the personality may react to a stimuli in the present that occurred originally twenty years ago, to the ego's understanding of time.
quotes.translation: 你无法在不影响其他系统的情况下探究其中一个系统。将人格视为独立于构成它的同时性行动之外，基本上毫无意义。如你所知，人格在梦宇宙中也具有实相。显而易见的是，在最基本且实际的方式下，人格无论如何都不涉及物理时间。只有人格的一部分——自我——才如此涉入。当然，人格系统会对那些在自我看来在时间上相距甚远的刺激做出反应。也就是说，人格可能会对当下发生的、但最初发生在二十年前的刺激做出反应，而这与自我对时间的理解相悖。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Obviously, time in terms of continuity, is not an element of importance in the dream universe, and this is one of the reasons for the lack of physical structure. The intuitions and certain inner abilities here have so much more freedom that it is unnecessary for molecules to be used in any imprisoning form or structure. Action is more spontaneous within the dream universe, more fluid. The images appear and disappear much more quickly because value fulfillment is allowed greater reign.
quotes.translation: 显然，就连续性而言，时间在梦宇宙中并非重要元素，这也是缺乏物理结构的原因之一。直觉和某些内在能力在此拥有更多自由，以至于分子无需被用于任何禁锢性的形式或结构。行动在梦宇宙中更为自发、更具流动性。影像出现和消失的速度更快，因为价值完成获得了更大的主导权。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Keep in mind here, though a discussion will wait for quite a while, that a like relationship occurs between the dream universe and the world of negative matter. There is surrounding this threefold system an envelope, so to speak, of uncamouflaged psychic phenomena. In other words, psychic energy gestalts, of which we will speak much later. They are important however; and from what you now know you realize that these energy forms represent mental enclosure units, operating in the same manner as our earlier ones of which we spoke when discussing the early development of energy within the physical field.
quotes.translation: 请记住——尽管相关讨论要等很久以后——梦宇宙与负物质世界之间也存在类似的关系。可以说，这个三重系统周围包裹着一层未经伪装的灵性现象外壳。换言之，即我们稍后会详细讨论的灵性能量完形。它们很重要；根据你目前所知，你会意识到这些能量形式代表着心智封闭单元，其运作方式与我们之前讨论物理场域内能量早期发展时所提及的早期单元相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You construct the dream universe, again, on a subconscious basis. The dream universe is as permanent in its way as the physical universe. You construct dreams whether you wake or you sleep. You are only familiar with your dreams when you sleep, for then your perception and your energy is focused in that direction.
quotes.translation: 你再次在潜意识基础上构建了梦境宇宙。梦境宇宙就其本身而言，与物质宇宙一样具有永久性。无论你醒着还是睡着，你都在构建梦境。你只在睡眠时才熟悉自己的梦境，因为那时你的感知和能量都聚焦在那个方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Projections that deal with your own system will of course involve you in some kind of camouflage. If none is present you know you are out of the system. The dream universe is obviously then strongly connected with your own, since pseudoimages are present. Already you are free to some extent from the space-time reality of your system. Therefore within the dream state you are in the outward areas of your physically-oriented universe, you see.
quotes.translation: 涉及你自己系统的投射，当然会让你卷入某种伪装。如果没有伪装存在，你就知道自己已脱离系统。梦境宇宙显然与你的系统紧密相连，因为其中存在伪像。你已经在一定程度上摆脱了系统的时空实相。因此，在梦境状态中，你正处于以物质为导向的宇宙的外围区域，你明白吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It goes without saying that the dream universe is every bit as real to the inner self as the physical universe is to the conscious egotistical self. The physical universe is relatively （underline relatively） as unimportant to the inner self as the dream universe appears to be to the egotistical self.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，梦境宇宙对内在自体而言，与物质宇宙对意识自我而言一样真实。物质宇宙对内在自体相对（强调相对）不重要，正如梦境宇宙对自我而言看似不重要一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: But the legs do walk, and the dream universe does exist. As the entity expands and originates new personalities, and these personalities then become independent individuals, so do the individuals create dream or so-called dream realities and individuals of the dream universe, which are independent.
quotes.translation: 但双腿确实在行走，梦境宇宙也确实存在。当本体扩展并衍生出新的人格，而这些人格随后成为独立的个体时，这些个体同样会创造梦境或所谓的梦境实相，以及梦境宇宙中独立的个体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Dreams are such connectives, for you see that this preliminary material is very much to the point as far as our dream universe is concerned, and is itself a connective to that discussion. This will be the basis for our next session, for you will see how dreams also serve as the other face, so that man himself stands at a threshold that is also a barrier, or stands at a barrier that is also a threshold.
quotes.translation: 梦境正是这样的连接物，因为你会发现，就我们的梦境宇宙而言，这些初步材料非常切题，并且其本身就是通往该讨论的连接。这将是我们下一节课的基础，因为你会看到梦境如何也扮演着另一副面孔，使得人类自身站在一个既是门槛也是屏障的关口，或站在一个既是屏障也是门槛的关口。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am again, not here praising the intuitions above the intellect. They are both intended for different purposes. They tune in on different realities, and all realities are actual. Nevertheless our last session, with its simplified explanation of development in terms that you can understand, should lead you to realize that because of the parallel development of the dream universe with the physical universe, the study of the dream universe will help you comprehend the basic inwardness behind the physical world that you inhabit.
quotes.translation: 我再次声明，此处并非在推崇直觉高于理智。它们各有不同的目的，各自调频于不同的实相，而所有实相都是真实的。尽管如此，我们上一节课用你能理解的简化方式解释了发展过程，这应能让你认识到：由于梦境宇宙与物质宇宙的平行发展，研究梦境宇宙将有助于你理解所栖身物质世界背后的内在本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In a manner of speaking, your universe and all others spring from a dimension that is the creative source for all realities--a basic dream universe, so to speak, a divine psychological bed where subjective being is sparked, illuminated, stimulated, pierced, by its own infinite desire for creativity. The source of its power is so great that its imaginings become worlds, but it is endowed with a creativity of such splendor that it seeks the finest fulfillment, for even the smallest of its thoughts and all of its potentials are directed with a good intent that is literally beyond all imagining.
quotes.translation: 可以说，你们的宇宙及所有其他宇宙都源自一个维度——那是所有实相的创造源头，一个基本的梦境宇宙，一个神圣的心理床榻，在那里，主观存在被自身对创造性的无限渴望所点燃、照亮、刺激、穿透。其力量之源如此强大，以至于它的想象化为世界，但它被赋予了如此辉煌的创造性，以至于它寻求最完美的实现，因为它最微小的念头及其所有潜能，都带着一种善意——这种善意简直超越一切想象。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Every action affects every other action. Mental enclosures are energy units possessing all the characteristics of such units as I have previously given you. You know that all action is basically mental action, as fields replenish each other. As no action is meaningless, so the dream universe and the physical universe constantly replenish each other, and mental actions are performed in both universes, being camouflage acting symbols for inner action.
quotes.translation: 每个行动都影响其他每个行动。心理围场是能量单元，具备我之前给你们的这类单元的所有特性。你们知道，所有行动本质上都是心理行动，如同场域相互补给。既然没有行动是无意义的，那么梦境宇宙和物质宇宙便不断相互补给，心理行动在这两个宇宙中都被执行，作为内在行动的伪装象征符号。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This involves, simply, a quickening of experience and action relatively unhampered by the sort of time necessities inherent within the physical universe. Action itself therefore is allowed greater freedom. This is not to say that structure does not exist within the dream universe, for structures of a mental or psychic nature do exist. But structure is not dependent upon matter as in the physical universe, and the motion of molecules is more spontaneous, and an almost unbelievable depth of experience is possible within what would seem to you a fraction of a moment.
quotes.translation: 这简单来说，涉及一种体验和行动的加速，相对不受物质宇宙固有的时间必然性所束缚。因此，行动本身被允许拥有更大的自由。这并非说梦境宇宙中没有结构，因为心理或心灵性质的结构确实存在。但结构不像在物质宇宙中那样依赖于物质，分子的运动更为自发，而在你们看来仿佛一瞬间的片刻内，可能体验到几乎难以置信的深度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As we progress and pick up the study of our dream universe once more, we will be involved also with the study of mental events as they occur within both systems. And because I am presently uninvolved within your system, it is possible for me to give instances as they occur of such mental actions, as they are perceived in both the universe of matter and the dream universe.
quotes.translation: 随着我们继续前进并重新开始研究我们的梦境宇宙，我们也将涉足两个系统内发生的心理事件研究。由于我目前未参与你们的系统，因此我有可能举出此类心理活动发生的实例，这些实例在物质宇宙和梦境宇宙中都能被感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I will have more to say concerning the connection between the two fields and their manifestation in action, for one of the closest glimpses you can get of pure action is action as it is involved within the dream universe, and in this mobility as the personality passes into and out of the dream field. Within your own universe you deal with the transformation of action into physical manipulations, but this involves but a small portion of the nature of action, and it is my purpose to familiarize you with action as it exists more or less in its pure form.
quotes.translation: 关于这两个场域之间的联系及其在行动中的显现，我会有更多论述，因为你能最接近地瞥见纯粹行动的方式之一，就是观察行动在梦境宇宙中的运作，以及当人格进出梦境场域时展现的这种流动性。在你们自己的宇宙中，你们处理的是行动转化为物质操作的过程，但这仅涉及行动本质的一小部分，而我的目的是让你们熟悉行动或多或少以其纯粹形式存在的样貌。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It might be said then, that in many ways the dream universe depends upon you to give it expression, in the same manner that you also depend upon it to find expression, although in this case you have other outlets, and it has few. The impact of any given dream has physical, chemical, electromagnetic, psychological and psychic repercussions. These are also actual and continuing, and they not only represent a part of your environment in all of these cases, but they affect most deeply the ordinary channels of everyday life.
quotes.translation: 因此可以说，在许多方面，梦境宇宙依赖你们来赋予它表达，正如你们也依赖它来寻找表达一样，尽管在这种情况下你们有其他出口，而它却很少。任何特定梦境的影响都具有物理、化学、电磁、心理和灵性上的回响。这些回响既真实又持续，它们不仅在所有情况下构成你们环境的一部分，而且最深刻地影响着日常生活的普通渠道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The following basic subjects are necessary for an understanding of what we are trying to say, particularly for any practical application: the construction of physical matter; the psychological and electrical gestalt that results in the formation of a self; the nature of the dream universe; the electrical system, as it is related to both the physical universe and the inner psychic gestalt; the nature of action; mental enclosures; mental genes; and again, all of these subjects in relationship to their reality as action.
quotes.translation: 要理解我们试图传达的内容，特别是任何实际应用，以下基本主题是必要的：物质实相的构建；导致自我形成的心理与电力完形；梦宇宙的本质；电力系统，及其与物质宇宙和内在心灵完形的关系；行动的本质；心灵围场；心灵基因；以及所有这些主题与它们作为行动实相的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In this abundance nothing is meaningless nor wasted. There is interrelationship, intertwining realities, and connections that cannot be denied. I told you that dream reality consisted of more than you knew, and that the dream universe continued whether or not you perceived it. Within that context those inhabitants dream in turn their own dreams and form electromagnetic realities. You are not at the top nor at the bottom of the heap of consciousness, so to speak. You are not at the center. You are not at the rim.
quotes.translation: 在这丰盛之中，没有什么是无意义或被浪费的。存在着相互关联、交织的实相，以及无法否认的连接。我曾告诉过你，梦实相包含的远比你已知的更多，而且无论你是否感知到它，梦宇宙都持续存在。在那个脉络中，那些居民反过来也做他们自己的梦，并形成电磁实相。可以说，你既不在意识堆叠的顶端，也不在底层。你不在中心。你也不在边缘。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The feeling of unreality is not felt when the dream experience is being participated in by the dreamer. At that time the experience is felt to be real, and some dreams indeed are more vivid than waking experience. It is only when the personality passes out of the dream experience, or the dream universe, that the dream experience in retrospect may appear unreal. For now, again, the focus of attention and energy is in the physical universe. Reality then is a result of the focus of energy and attention.
quotes.translation: 当做梦者参与梦境体验时，并不会感到不真实。在那时，体验被认为是真实的，有些梦境甚至比清醒体验更生动。只有当人格脱离梦境体验或梦宇宙时，回顾中的梦境体验才可能显得不真实。因为此时，注意力与能量的焦点再次落在物质宇宙中。因此，实相是能量与注意力聚焦的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Dream images, not astral projections, operate within certain electrical limits, limits that form the boundaries of the dream universe. Dream images are nevertheless almost fibrous projections, almost a thinned-out composition, more plastic basically than physical matter, but composed of a number of the same properties. For again there must be this connection between the nature of dreams and the matter of physical reality.
quotes.translation: 梦境影像（而非星光体投射）在特定的电力限制内运作，这些限制构成了梦宇宙的边界。然而梦境影像几乎是纤维状的投射，近乎稀薄的构成，本质上比物质更可塑，却由许多相同属性组成。因为梦的本质与物质实相的本质之间，必须再次存在这种关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: If the dream world, the mind, and the inner universe do exist, but not in space, and if they do not exist basically in time, though they may be glimpsed through time, then your question will be: In what medium or in what manner do they exist, and without time, how can they be said to exist in duration? I am telling you that the basic universe exists behind all camouflage universes in the same manner, and taking up no space, that the mind exists behind the brain. The brain is a camouflage pattern. It takes up space. It exists in time, but the mind takes up no space and does not have its basic existence in time. Your camouflage universe, on the other hand, takes up space and exists in time.
quotes.translation: 若梦世界、心智与内在宇宙确实存在，却不在空间中，且基本上不存在于时间里（尽管可能透过时间瞥见它们），那么你的问题将是：它们存在于何种媒介或方式中？若没有时间，又如何能说它们存在于绵延中？我告诉你，基本宇宙以相同方式存在于所有伪装宇宙之后，不占据空间，正如心智存在于大脑之后。大脑是伪装模式，占据空间，存在于时间中；但心智不占据空间，其基本存在也不在时间里。反之，你的伪装宇宙既占据空间又存在于时间中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 705)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In many respects actions within the dream universe are indeed more direct than in your own. It is because you remember but vague glimmerings and disconnected episodes that dreams appear, sometimes, chaotic or meaningless, particularly to the ego, which censors rigidly much of the information that the subconscious does retain.
quotes.translation: 在许多方面，梦宇宙中的行动确实比你们自己的宇宙更直接。正因你只记得模糊微光与不连贯片段，梦境才显得时而混乱或无意义——尤其对自我而言，它会严格审查潜意识确实保留的许多信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: But the significance is not seen. No energy is not used. Entropy does not exist. It is the appearance only of an effect within the physical perspectives; that seemingly unusable energy helps form your dream universe. That energy from which you seem to get no work physically, that energy which seems to diminish in value, is plowed backward into inwardness, regenerated and used to form universes without which you could not exist even as physical beings.
quotes.translation: 但其意义未被看见。没有能量不被使用。熵并不存在。它只是物理视角内的一种表象；那看似无法利用的能量，正协助形成你的梦境宇宙。那些你似乎无法从中获得物理功用的能量，那些看似价值递减的能量，被反向犁入内在性中，重新生成并用于构建宇宙——没有这些宇宙，你甚至无法作为物质存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In order that you understand it is necessary, as I have told you, for me to break down concepts. In this way much of the unity of certain phenomena may escape you. We have spoken at various times about specific portions of action's manifestations. We have discussed to some degree, for example, the nature of matter, the electrical universe, the dream universe, and such other topics as the layers of the subconscious and the nature of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 为了让你理解，正如我告诉过你的，我必须分解概念。如此一来，某些现象的完整性可能会被你遗漏。我们曾多次讨论行动显化的特定部分。例如，我们已在一定程度上探讨过物质本质、电性宇宙、梦境宇宙，以及潜意识层次和整体自性本质等主题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inverted time system should be at least briefly explained in the Seth book. I do not want to dictate to Ruburt, or tell him how to write this book. It occurs to me however that it would be advantageous to include in the middle section my ideas concerning the construction of physical matter, the inverted time system, moment points, a discussion concerning the dream universe, and the system of probability. All of this in direct quotes from the material itself. The last section of the book could then deal with what evidential material we have, and you shall have more. I am certain that Ruburt could so organize the center portion of the book so that stress could still be given to the personal story line.
quotes.translation: 倒置时间系统至少应在赛斯书中简要说明。我不想指挥鲁柏，或告诉他如何撰写此书。但我想到，在中部章节纳入我对物质构建、倒置时间系统、瞬间点、梦境宇宙的讨论以及概率系统，将大有裨益。所有这些内容均直接引用资料原文。本书最后章节则可处理我们已有的证据材料——你们还将获得更多。我确信鲁柏能妥善组织书中部章节，使个人故事线仍能获得强调。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now. I have said that any of you and all of you create a dream universe of validity, actuality, durability, and for Philip's benefit, self-determination, in the same manner that the entity projects the reality of its various personalities. As there is no contact between the entity and the ordinary conscious ego, so there is no contact on a conscious level between the self who dreams and the dream world which has its own independent existence.
quotes.translation: 现在。我曾说过，你们中的任何一个人和所有人，都创造了一个具有有效性、真实性、持久性，并且为了菲利普的利益，具有自决性的梦境宇宙，其方式与本体投射其各种人格的现实相同。正如本体与普通意识自我之间没有联系，做梦的自我与具有独立存在的梦境世界之间在意识层面上也没有联系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We have discussed this subject to some degree. However we have not begun a study in depth. It is now time for us to do so. The personality as you know is composed of energy gestalts. The dreams created by the personality can be considered therefore as a part of the changing personality. We are speaking here in one context only, for we know that the dream universe is also to some extent independent of personality.
quotes.translation: 我们已在某种程度上讨论过这个主题。然而，我们尚未开始深入研究。现在是时候这样做了。如你所知，人格是由能量完形组成的。因此，人格创造的梦境可以被视为变化中人格的一部分。我们这里仅在一个语境中讨论，因为我们知道梦境宇宙在某种程度上也独立于人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It goes without saying, or should, that the inner self sends its projections of inner senses through both the physical universe and the dream universe; yet all this talk of space and placement is a mere convenience. Yet, in terms of physical construction this is what you would find, and this, if it were understood, is what is seen in the actual construction of the most minute physical particle under observation in your laboratories.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，或者说应该不言而喻的是，内在自我通过物质宇宙和梦境宇宙投射其内在感官的投射；然而所有这些关于空间和位置的讨论仅仅是一种便利。但就物质结构而言，这正是你会发现的情况，如果被理解的话，这也是在你们实验室中观察到的、最微小的物质粒子的实际结构中可见的现象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Nor is the dream universe a shadow image of your own. It carries on according to the possibilities inherent within it, as you carry on according to the possibilities that exist within the physical field. The possibilities for action vary, however, within these two fields as they vary within all other fields. You may say that in sleeping you focus your energies to form a different reality than the reality of waking physical matter.
quotes.translation: 梦境宇宙也并非你们世界的影子映像。它依循自身内在的可能性运作，正如你们依循物质场域中的可能性运作。然而，这两个场域中的行动可能性各有不同，正如所有其他场域中的可能性也各不相同。你可以说，在睡眠中你集中能量，形成与清醒物质现实截然不同的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We must also clear up some points on other topics. We will shortly be concerned more directly with discussions of individual dreams. It is necessary that a firm ground be prepared for such discussion. There are various doorways into the dream universe: chemical doorways, electronic doorways, and psychological doorways. All three must be opened at once, that is simultaneously, but any one door will automatically open the others.
quotes.translation: 我们还需厘清其他主题的若干要点。不久我们将更直接地探讨个人梦境。为此必须奠定坚实基础。通往梦境宇宙有诸多门户：化学门户、电子门户与心理门户。这三者必须同时开启，但任何一扇门都会自动开启其余两扇。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is always within this framework, but not always does it maintain the same relative position within it. The stability of the personality depends in some degree upon the effectiveness with which it handles and manipulates these dream situations. It is realized that the personality manipulates within the physical universe, but the fact is not generally accepted that similar manipulations must be made within this dream universe.
quotes.translation: 它始终处于这个架构之内，但并非总在其中保持相同相对位置。人格的稳定性，部分取决于它处理与操控这些梦境情境的有效程度。人们虽承认人格在物质宇宙中运作，却普遍未认识到在梦境宇宙中同样需要类似的操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Problems leading to world wars also cause worldwide natural disasters. These are merely another materialization of energy projected by those who have not learned how to handle it. Such reactions fire through the dream universe also, and are reflected through all phases of your activity. The whole self compares the performance of various portions of itself in physical reality and in dream reality, and draws its own conclusions.
quotes.translation: 导致世界大战的问题同样引发全球性的自然灾害。这不过是那些尚未学会处理能量的人所投射能量的另一种物质化表现。这类反应也会穿越梦境宇宙，并反映在你活动的所有层面中。整体自我会对比其在物质实相与梦境实相中不同部分的表现，并得出自己的结论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In this particular context however the dream world will be considered in its relationship to the personality. In many ways the dream universe does operate within this context, and is part of the personality framework. As the personality is changed by any experience or any action, so it is changed by its own dreams. Here again we see how energy or action operates within itself. We can even trace the actions and interactions.
quotes.translation: 然而在此特定脉络下，我们将探讨梦境世界与人格的关系。梦境宇宙在许多层面确实在此脉络中运作，并构成人格架构的一部分。正如人格会因任何经验或行动而改变，它同样会因自身的梦境而改变。在此我们再次看到能量或行动如何在自身内部运作。我们甚至可以追溯这些行动与互动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: All of these influences have a part in the formation of the physical individual, and his existence is dependent upon a balance being maintained. In some instances, to use an analogy, serious short circuits do occur, intensities of power accumulate. The dream universe, for example, may intrude with unusual sharpness. The systems lose complementary balance, but on the whole the systems operate together most efficiently.
quotes.translation: 所有这些影响都参与塑造物质个体的形成，而个体的存在依赖于平衡的维持。举例来说，在某些情况下确实会发生严重的短路现象，能量强度不断累积。例如，梦境宇宙可能以异常尖锐的方式侵入。各系统会失去互补平衡，但整体而言，这些系统仍以最高效率协同运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This frequently happens in the dream state, although such a performance can be achieved in varying altered states of consciousness. At such times consciousness simply puts itself in a different relationship with time and space. The physical body cannot follow, however. It is by altering its own relationship with the physical universe that consciousness can best understand its own properties, and glimpse from another vantage point that physical universe, where it will be seen in a different light. Operating outside the body, consciousness can better perceive the properties of matter. It cannot (intently) experience matter, however, in the same fashion as it can when it is physically oriented.
quotes.translation: 这种情况在梦境状态中经常发生，尽管这种表现也能在各种变异的意识状态中达成。此时意识只是将自己置于与时间和空间不同的关系中，然而物质身体无法跟随。正是通过改变自身与物质宇宙的关系，意识才能最好地理解自身的特性，并从另一个有利位置瞥见那个物质宇宙——在那里它将以不同的光景被看见。在身体之外运作时，意识能更清晰地感知物质的属性。然而它无法像在物质导向时那样，以同样的方式（专注地）体验物质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 709
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You do indeed give them energy, as they also give you energy. Dreams, or the dream universe, exists even while you wake, and you only become aware of certain portions of it even while you sleep. You do create it, but it is also to some degree independent of you. As your ego experiences changes in its relationship with the physical world, so do you change aspects of the dream world accordingly, and enrich it.
quotes.translation: 你们确实给予它们能量，正如它们也给予你们能量。梦境或梦境宇宙甚至在你们清醒时也存在，而你们即使在睡眠中也只能意识到它的某些部分。你们确实创造了它，但它在某种程度上也独立于你们。如同自我在它与物质世界的关系中经历变化，你们也相应地改变梦境的面向，并丰富它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I wanted to give you this material because it is basic for any comprehension of mental acts as they occur in the dream universe and the universe of matter. There will also be additional information concerning the concept of time, as the experience of time is strongly connected with the motion of mental acts, as they are projected outward from their center into the fields of various camouflage systems.
quotes.translation: 我想提供这份资料，因为它是理解心灵活动在梦境宇宙与物质宇宙中如何发生的基础。关于时间概念还会有额外信息，因为时间的体验与心灵活动的运动紧密相连——这些活动从它们的中心向外投射，进入各种伪装系统的场域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The playfulness and creativity of dreams are vastly underrated in most dream studies. Children often frighten themselves on purpose through games, knowing the game's framework all the time. The bogeyman in the garden vanishes at the sound of the supper bell. The child returns to the safe universe of tea and biscuits. Dreams often serve the same purpose. Fears are encountered, but the dawn breaks. The dreamer awakes for breakfast. The fears, after all, are seen as groundless. This is not an explanation for all unpleasant dreams by any means, yet it is a reminder that not all such events are neurotic or indicative of future physical problems.
quotes.translation: 梦的嬉戏性与创造力在多数梦的研究中遭到严重低估。孩童常明知游戏框架却故意吓唬自己——花园里的妖怪在晚餐铃响时消失无踪，孩子便回到茶与饼干的安全宇宙。梦境常发挥相同作用：恐惧被遭遇，但黎明终将破晓。做梦者醒来享用早餐，那些恐惧终究被视为毫无根据。这绝非对所有不愉快梦境的解释，却提醒我们并非所有此类事件都源于神经质或预示未来身体问题。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is important that you realize that the dream world is a by-product of your own existence. And because it is connected to you through chemical reactions this leaves open the entryway of interactions, in animals as well as men. Since dreams are a by-product of any consciousness involved with matter, this leads us to the correct conclusion--that trees have their dreams, that all physical matter, being formed about individualized units of consciousness of varying degrees, also participates in the involuntary construction of the dream universe.
quotes.translation: 你必须明白，梦的世界是你自身存在的副产品。由于它通过化学反应与你相连，这为人类与动物都保留了互动的通道。既然梦是任何与物质打交道的意识的副产品，我们便能得出正确结论——树木拥有它们的梦境，所有物质形态既围绕不同程度个体化的意识单位形成，也参与着梦宇宙的无意识构建。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Symbols can be called psychic codes that are interpreted in infinite fashion according to the circumstances in which consciousness finds itself. Dream events "come together" in the same way that the universe does. Events, therefore, cannot be precisely defined. You can explore your own experience of an event, and that exploration itself alters the nature of the seemingly separate event that you began to investigate. You share, then, a mass dream experience as you share a mass waking world. Your daily experience is private and uniquely yours, yet it happens within the context of a shared environment. The same applies to the dream state.
quotes.translation: 符号可被称为心灵密码，根据意识所处情境以无限方式被解读。梦境事件"聚合"的方式与宇宙的聚合如出一辙。因此事件无法被精确定义。你可以探索自己对某个事件的体验，而这种探索本身会改变你最初着手调查的那个看似独立事件的性质。你共享着集体梦境体验，正如你共享集体清醒世界。你的日常体验是私密且独一无二的，却发生在共享环境的脉络中。梦境状态亦是如此。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Action cannot be dammed up, for it becomes explosive. There are many balances to be maintained. The dream world of which we have spoken so often is also action, and as such it affects all other action. It is not apart from your so- called physical universe, for the dream universe, through its connection with the inner self, also helps to construct physical matter--and this is no trifling matter.
quotes.translation: 行动不能被堵塞，否则它会变得具有爆炸性。有许多平衡需要维持。我们经常提到的梦境世界也是行动，因此它会影响所有其他行动。它并非脱离你们所谓的物质宇宙而存在，因为梦境宇宙通过其与内在自我的联系，也协助构建物质实体——这绝非小事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: On one level they could be said not to exist, and yet they do exist. While in your dream, you are able to see and touch and move about in these locations. It is only when you awake that they escape you. This should be considered along with our material on the expanding universe, since dream locations represent, certainly, a reality, even a framework that has no existence in your space; and measured purely along the lines used to measure your space, you would receive no hint at all of their existence or reality. Measured purely in terms of your camouflage conceptions, many things which you know to exist would seem not to exist.
quotes.translation: 在某个层面上，它们可以说并不存在，然而它们确实存在。当你在梦中时，你能够看到、触摸并在这些地点中移动。只有当你醒来时，它们才从你身边消失。这一点应结合我们关于膨胀宇宙的资料来思考，因为梦境地点无疑代表了一种实相，甚至是一个在你们空间中不存在的架构；若纯粹以衡量你们空间的标准来衡量，你根本不会得到任何关于它们存在或实相的线索。若纯粹以你们伪装观念的标准来衡量，许多你知道存在的事物似乎会不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now, and this can hardly be called a controversial statement, the imagination is waking mans connection with the universe of dreams. Imagination often restates dream data, and applies it to particular circumstances or problems within the physical universe. Imagination is never basically destructive. In some cases the ego construction may be weak, or incapable of holding its own, in which case the imagination is often said to be too excitable, and to be at fault.
quotes.translation: 现在，这几乎不能被称为有争议的陈述：想象力是清醒之人与梦境宇宙的连接。想象力常常重新陈述梦境数据，并将其应用于物质宇宙中的特定情境或问题。想象力从来不是根本性的破坏力量。在某些情况下，自我结构可能薄弱，或无法维持自身，此时想象力常被认为过于亢奋，并被视为有过错。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Nor have I forgotten any of the psychological time incidences. These will all be covered in a particular sequence of particular material devoted to them in a chunk, so to speak. Nor could I have even begun this explanation of the relationship and growth of the physical universe, the universe of negative matter, and the dream universe at a much earlier date. The preparations had to be laid.
quotes.translation: 我也没有忘记任何心理时间的事件。这些都将以特定序列集中呈现，好比说，在专门探讨它们的特定资料区块中。我甚至无法更早开始解释物质宇宙、负物质宇宙与梦宇宙之间的关系与成长。准备工作必须先行完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You may say if you wish that I am a dream image lacking even an image -- but if so, then each individual whose life is changed by my words must question: "What is a dream?" In the same way that my personality exists without physical manifestation, so does your own. Your dreaming and waking experience has a direct effect upon the entire universe. The difference is that you are not consciously aware of what you are doing, but I am. I change a world to some extent, though in your terms I will not actually sit in a chair or walk the streets, or shake your hand, or see the twilight come, or the sunrise.
quotes.translation: 你大可以说我是个连影像都没有的梦影——但若如此，每个因我话语而改变生命的人就必须追问："梦是什么？"正如我的人格无需物质显化而存在，你的人格亦然。你的梦境与清醒体验直接影响整个宇宙。区别在于你并未有意识地觉察自己的作为，而我却了然于心。我在某种程度上改变着世界，尽管以你们的说法，我既不会真正坐在椅子上，也不会漫步街头，无法与你握手，更看不见暮色降临或旭日东升。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Such subjective events therefore manipulate physical matter through the personality who experiences them. The field of reality for any given personality must and does include all these areas of activity, for they give form and dimension to his existence. I have said earlier that the individual could not exist in a physical universe if he did not also exist in the dream universe. Again, there are chemical and electromagnetic connections that cannot be severed between all these states of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因此，这类主观事件通过体验它们的人格来操控物质。任何特定人格的现实领域必然且确实包含所有这些活动领域，因为它们为其存在赋予形式与维度。我先前说过，若个体不同时存在于梦宇宙中，便无法存在于物质宇宙。再次强调，所有这些意识状态之间存在着不可切断的化学与电磁连接。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There are such manipulations within various systems that change other systems. Your own behavior and action within the dream universe definitely affects the physical universe. From one field of activity then you have changed another, and without ever knowing, in many cases, that you have done so. In the same manner do the activities of the physical universe alter the dream system.
quotes.translation: 各种系统内存在着改变其他系统的操作。你在梦宇宙中的行为与行动确实会影响物质宇宙。于是你从一个活动领域改变了另一个领域，而在许多情况下，你甚至完全不知道自己曾这样做。同样地，物质宇宙的活动也会改变梦系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Such a remark may appear so simple that it is not worth saying, but it is extremely important that it be understood. In like manner, there is indeed no particular boundary or line of demarcation between the dream universe and the physical universe. Any seeming barrier is artificial, for all these realities merge one into the other, and an action in one affects the other.
quotes.translation: 这样的说法或许看似简单到不值一提，但理解它却极为重要。同理，梦宇宙与物质宇宙之间确实没有特定的界限或分界线。任何看似存在的屏障都是人为的，因为所有这些实相都相互融合，一个实相中的行动会影响另一个实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This situation can be serious in varying degrees, according to the impetus and intensity of the original propelling cause behind the impeding action. If the impetus is a powerful one, then the impeding action will be of more serious nature, blocking up large reserves of energy for its own purposes. It obviously becomes part of the personality-psychological structure, the physical structure, the electrical and chemical structure, invading to some extent even the dream universe.
quotes.translation: 根据阻碍行动背后原始推动力的冲劲与强度，这种情况可能产生不同程度的严重性。若冲劲强大，则阻碍行动的性质将更为严重，会为自身目的封锁大量能量储备。它显然成为人格-心理结构、物质结构、电性与化学结构的一部分，甚至在一定程度上侵入梦宇宙。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is only because their realities are so distorted that the difficulty is discovered. I mentioned many sessions back that your physical universe, so taken for granted, is actually at least as diverse and multitudinous as the dream system. Within the physical universe you merely focus upon similarities and ignore the vast differences that exist. Each reality is completely unique for every individual, and through his own actions he attempts therefore to communicate the nature of this reality of his to his fellows.
quotes.translation: 只因他们的实相扭曲得如此严重，才会发现这个困难。我在许多节前曾提到，你们视为理所当然的物质宇宙，实际上至少和梦境系统一样多样而繁复。在物质宇宙中，你们只聚焦于相似之处，却忽略了存在的巨大差异。每个实相对每个个体而言都是完全独特的，而个体通过自身行动，试图向同伴传达自己实相的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There are dreams of different import, some triggered genetically, that serve as sparks for particular kinds of behavior--dreams, in other words, that literally span the centuries in that regard, coiled latently in the very chromosomes; and no level of consciousness is without some kind of participation in dream states. In that regard even electrons, for example, dream. Dreaming touches upon both microscopic and macroscopic events, or realities, and is not simply a human characteristic, appropriately appearing within your own range or within your own species. It is instead one area of subjective experience that is everywhere prevailing within the universe.
quotes.translation: 存在不同意义的梦境，有些由基因触发，作为特定行为模式的火花——换言之，有些梦境在染色体中潜伏着，确实跨越了数个世纪；没有任何意识层次不参与梦境状态。就此而言，甚至电子也会做梦。梦境触及微观与宏观事件或实相，并非仅是出现在你们范畴或物种中的人类特征。相反，它是宇宙中普遍存在的主观经验领域之一。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I want to make a point however, that the dream universe is as real and cohesive as your own, and that the same glue of telepathy holds it together, and gives it not only as much reality but validity in actual terms.
quotes.translation: 然而我想强调一点：梦境宇宙与你们的宇宙同样真实且凝聚，同样的心电感应胶质将其维系在一起，不仅赋予它同等的实相，更赋予它实际的有效性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have often said that all these divisions and separations are arbitrary. All exist one within another. Apparent boundaries are not boundaries, but only differences in the focus of attention. Even this inner ego is not the same from one given moment to another, for it is not a static thing, but is a part of continuing action. It is much more familiar with the subconscious and with the dream universe, and with the inner self, than it is with the outside ego, however.
quotes.translation: 我常说过，所有这些划分与分离都是武断的。一切皆彼此相融。看似分明的界限并非真正的边界，只是注意力焦点的差异。就连这个内在自我，也并非从某一刻到下一刻始终如一，因为它并非静止之物，而是持续行动的一部分。然而，它比外在自我更熟悉潜意识、梦境宇宙以及内在自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I mentioned the chemical relationship between your universe and the dream universe. There are like relationships of one kind or another that tie together all fields and systems, from the largest to the most minute. The freedom of the inner self, then, is never determined by time as you know it. It is determined by time as you do not know it.
quotes.translation: 我曾提及你们宇宙与梦境宇宙之间的化学关联。类似的关系以各种形式将一切场域与系统联结，从最宏大者到最细微者。因此，内在自体的自由绝不受你们所认知的时间所限定，而是由你们尚未认知的时间所决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Since I have also said that basically the universe has no more to do with space in your terms than does the dream world, you may deduce a similarity between the medium in which both the basic universe and the dream world may be found. You must understand here that your idea of space is something quite different from the reality of our fifth dimensional space. I want to make this plain again before we continue.
quotes.translation: 既然我也说过，就你们的定义而言，宇宙与空间的关系并不比梦境世界更密切，那么你们可以推断出基本宇宙与梦境世界所处的介质具有相似性。在此必须明白，你们对空间的概念与我们第五维度空间的实相截然不同。在继续讨论前，我想再次阐明这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In his reading he came across a statement to the effect that imaginary two-dimensional people could not comprehend a three-dimensional system. You are obviously in the physical system, and according to your terms fourth dimensional. Your dream world, of which I have spoken, could be compared to a third- dimensional universe. However, the dimensions of which physics speaks are, again, the result of your own point of reference, and of the system in which you are enclosed.
quotes.translation: 他在阅读时偶然看到一段话，大意是想象中二维平面的人无法理解三维立体系统。你显然处于物质系统之中，按你们的说法属于第四维度。我曾提及的你的梦境世界，可比作一个三维宇宙。然而物理学所讨论的维度，同样是你自身参照点及所处系统的产物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is one small point I wanted to mention this evening, merely for future reference: We have hardly begun any thorough study of the dream universe, and have dealt with it mainly in connection with other discussions. We will however discuss it in detail, and we will use dreams from your own notebooks as examples in this study.
quotes.translation: 今晚我想提一个小要点，仅作未来参考：我们对梦境宇宙的全面研究尚未真正展开，目前主要是在其他讨论中顺带提及。不过我们将详细探讨这个主题，并以你笔记本中的梦境记录作为研究范例。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: To me your world is a dream universe which I visit by invitation, a probable reality that I find unique and very dear -- but one in which I can no longer have direct experience. Because I am not as immersed in it as you, I can tell you much about it, since your precise orientation necessitates a more narrow, concentrated view.
quotes.translation: 对我而言，你们的世界是我受邀造访的梦境宇宙，一个独特而珍贵的或然实相——但我已无法在其中获得直接体验。正因我不似你这般沉浸其中，反而能向你揭示更多真相，因为你们精确的定向需要更狭窄集中的视角。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now nevertheless the dream world, the mind and the reality universe do exist. They exist in a climate that we will call the value climate of psychological reality. This is the medium. This takes the place of what you call space. This value climate of psychological reality is a quality which makes all existences and consciousness possible. It is one of the most powerful principles behind or within the vitality that itself composes from itself all other phenomena.
quotes.translation: 然而，梦境世界、心智与实相宇宙确实存在。它们存在于我们称之为"心理实相的价值气候"中。这是媒介，取代了你们所谓的空间。这种心理实相的价值气候是一种特质，使所有存在与意识成为可能。它是生命力背后或内部最强大的原则之一，而生命力本身又从自身构建出所有其他现象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The self is extended, so to speak, existing within many dimensions. It extends as vitally and actually in the dream universe as it does in your own physical universe. It is as much a part of the electrical universe as it is a part of the world of psychological motivation. The intertwinings are infinite in all directions.
quotes.translation: 可以说，自我是延伸的，存在于许多维度中。它在梦境宇宙中的延伸，与在你们物质宇宙中的延伸同样充满活力且真实。它既是电性宇宙的一部分，也是心理动机世界的一部分。这些交织在一切方向上都是无限的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: They open infrequently in the waking state. When they are clicked open, usually but not always chemically through a momentary imbalance, the physical organism itself is connected to the dream universe, as well as to your physical universe; and to some degree the physical organism can be affected through this connection.
quotes.translation: 在清醒状态下，这些联结很少开启。当它们被"咔嗒"打开时——通常（但并非总是）通过化学性的短暂失衡——物质有机体本身便与梦境宇宙以及你们的物质宇宙相连；通过这种联结，物质有机体在某种程度上也会受到影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am simply suggesting that you become more natural. Because science has made an effective barrier to that method of approach, the power seems to reside in the gadgets rather than in man. Man no longer identifies with a storm, for example, and has lost his sense of relationship with it, and therefore his natural power over it. The same applies to storms of the psyche. The dream-art scientist, the true mental physicist, the complete physician -- such designations represent the kinds of training that could allow you to understand the unknown, and therefore the known reality, and so become aware of the blueprints that exist behind the physical universe. The proof is in the pudding, of course. Largely, it seems that your techniques work a good deal of the time. Let us look at medicine, for instance.
quotes.translation: 我只是建议你变得更自然些。因为科学已对那种接近方法造成了有效障碍，力量似乎存在于小装置中而非人类自身。例如，人不再认同于风暴，失去了与它的关联感，因而也失去了对它的自然掌控力。这同样适用于心灵的风暴。梦之艺术科学家、真正的精神物理学家、完整的医师——这些称谓代表着能让你理解未知（从而理解已知实相）的训练方式，进而意识到物理宇宙背后存在的蓝图。当然，实践是检验真理的标准。大体上，你的方法似乎大部分时间都奏效。让我们以医学为例。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The body learned to maintain its stability, its strength and agility, to achieve a state of balance in complementary response to the weather and elements, to dream computations that the conscious mind alone could not hold. The body learned to heal itself in sleep in its dreams--and at certain levels in that state even now each portion of consciousness contributes to the health and stability of all other portions. Far from the claw-and-dagger universe, you have one whose very foundation is based upon the loving cooperation of all of its parts. That is given--the gift of life brings along with it the actualization of that cooperation, for the body's parts exist as a unit because of inner relationships of a cooperative nature; and those exist at your birth (most emphatically), when you are innocent of any cultural beliefs that may be to the contrary.
quotes.translation: 身体学会了维持其稳定性、力量和敏捷性，在对天气和元素的互补反应中达到平衡状态，并完成清醒意识无法单独处理的梦之计算。身体学会了在睡眠和梦境中自我疗愈——在那个状态的某些层面，即使现在，意识的每个部分都在为所有其他部分的健康与稳定做出贡献。远非利爪匕首的宇宙，你拥有的宇宙其根基建立在所有部分充满爱意的合作之上。这是天赋——生命的礼物带来了那种合作的实现，因为身体的各部分之所以能作为整体存在，正是由于合作性质的内在关系；而这些关系在你出生时（最强调地）就已存在，那时你尚未受到任何可能相反的文化信念的影响。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Those "properties" are the faculties of the imagination, creativity, telepathy, clairvoyance, and dreaming, as well as the functions of logic and reason. You know that you dream. You know that you think. Those are direct experiences. (Pause.) Anytime you use instruments to probe into the nature of reality, you are looking at a kind of secondary evidence, no matter how excellent the instruments may be. The subjective evidence of dreaming, for example, is far more "convincing" and irrefutable than is the evidence for an expanding universe, black holes, or even atoms and molecules themselves. Although instruments can indeed be most advantageous in many ways, they still present you with secondary rather than primary tools of investigation--and they distort the nature of reality far more than the subjective attributes of thoughts, feelings, and intuitions do.
quotes.translation: 那些"属性"是想象力、创造力、心灵感应、千里眼和做梦的能力，以及逻辑与理性的功能。你知道自己做梦。你知道自己思考。这些都是直接体验。（停顿）任何时候你使用仪器探究实相的本质，你看到的都是一种次级证据，无论仪器多么精良。例如，做梦的主观证据远比膨胀宇宙、黑洞甚至原子和分子本身的证据更"令人信服"且无可辩驳。尽管仪器在许多方面确实极为有利，但它们呈现给你的仍是次要而非首要的调查工具——而且它们对实相本质的扭曲程度远超过思想、情感和直觉的主观属性。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The universe is expanding in the way that a dream expands. In other words this expansion has nothing to do with your （underline） idea of space. The expansion, in a most basic manner, is more like the expansion of an idea. It has nothing to do with space or time in the manner in which you are accustomed to think of them. I told you earlier that your scientist's idea of an expanding universe was in error, although in one important sense the universe was expanding, and this is what I referred to.
quotes.translation: 宇宙的膨胀方式如同梦境的扩展。换言之，这种膨胀与你们（划线）所认知的空间概念毫无关联。从最根本的层面而言，这种膨胀更像是一个观念的延伸，与你们习惯理解的空间或时间方式全然无关。我先前告诉过你们，科学家关于宇宙膨胀的认知存在谬误，尽管在某个重要意义上宇宙确实在膨胀——这正是我所指涉的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Concepts, ideas, realized in dreams, have then been constructed physically. Physical constructions and inventions, purely in terms of a new intellectual comprehension of physical matter, have also transformed the nature of the dream universe, and enriched it, adding to the symbolistic freedoms possible there.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中实现的概念与理念，随后被建构为物质形态。纯粹基于对物质实相全新智性理解的物质建构与发明，也转化了梦境宇宙的本质，丰富了其内涵，并增添了其中可能存在的象征性自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now: Dictation. (With many pauses:) When I speak of the dream world, I am not referring to some imaginary realm, but to the kind of world of ideas, of thoughts, of mental actions, out of which all form as you think of it emerges. In actuality this is an inner universe rather than an inner world. Your physical reality is but one materialization of that inner organization. All possible civilizations exist first in that realm of inner mind.
quotes.translation: 现在：口述。（多次停顿后：）当我谈及梦境世界时，并非指某个虚幻领域，而是指那种由观念、思想、心智活动构成的世界——你们所认知的一切形态皆由此涌现。实际上，这更应被称为内在宇宙而非内在世界。你们的物质实相仅是那内在组织的一种物质化呈现。所有可能的文明，最初都存在于那内在心智的领域之中。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The practical nature of his own dreams was also more apparent, for again, his dreams sent him precise visions as to where food might be located, for example, and for some centuries there were human migrations of a kind that now you see the geese make. All of those journeys followed literal paths that were given as information in the dream state. [But] more and more man began to identify himself with his exterior environment. He began to think of his inner ego almost as if it were a stranger to himself. It became his version of the soul, and there seemed to be a duality--a self who acted in the physical universe, and a separate spiritlike soul that acted in an immaterial world.
quotes.translation: 他自身梦境的实际本质也更为明显，因为举例来说，他的梦境会向他传递关于何处可觅得食物的精确景象。在长达数世纪的时间里，人类曾进行过如今你们所见雁群所做的那种迁徙。所有这些迁徙都遵循着在梦境状态中作为信息给出的具体路径。但人类越来越开始将自己与外在环境等同起来。他开始将内在自我视为几乎如同陌生人一般。这内在自我成了他心目中的灵魂版本，于是便出现了一种二元性——一个在物质宇宙中行动的自我，与一个在非物质世界中活动的、类似灵体的灵魂。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The mind will be found to be closely allied with the spacious present. The mind's capabilities, if studied, would lead man into a realization of these other fields of actuality of which I have spoken. The mind deals with intangibles, but it does not deal with unrealities. Again, the validity of an actuality is not to be determined by its appearance within matter alone. The ingredients of matter are first of all intangible ingredients, and the study of the mind and a study of the processes by which the mind creates its dream images could lead to a basic understanding of the manner in which man subconsciously produces the physical images of his own material universe.
quotes.translation: 人们将会发现心智与广袤现在紧密相连。若对心智的能力加以研究，将引导人类认识到我所说的这些其他实相领域。心智处理的是无形之物，但它并不处理不真实之物。再次强调，一个实相的有效性不能仅凭其在物质中的显现来判断。物质的成分首先是无形的成分，而对心智的研究，以及对心智创造其梦境意象过程的研究，可以引导人们基本理解人类潜意识中如何产生其自身物质宇宙的物质意象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You must, then, project or materialize the dream universe outside of the physical self in an electric reality, and then reinterpret it, because the original dream experience has an electric reality that cannot be perceived or used, even by its creators, until it is decoded.
quotes.translation: 因此，你必须将梦境宇宙投射或物质化到物质自我之外的电子实相中，然后再重新诠释它，因为原始的梦境体验具有一种电子实相，这种实相在解码之前，即使是其创造者也无法感知或利用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: One takes up space in your universe and the other does not. The universe expands in the manner that a dream expands, taking up no camouflage space. This does not mean that there is no growth involved in the expansion of the universe. This does not imply that there is no movement. It simply implies an existence and an expansion of a qualitative manner, beyond your present measurements or complete comprehension.
quotes.translation: 一个在你的宇宙中占据空间，而另一个则不占据。宇宙以梦境扩展的方式扩展，不占据任何伪装空间。这并不意味着宇宙的扩展不涉及成长，也不意味着没有运动。它只是暗示一种存在和一种性质上的扩展，超越了你们当前的测量或完全理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I have said that the dream world has its own sort of form and permanence. It is physically oriented, though not to the degree inherent in your ordinary universe. In the same manner that the physical image is built up of an individual, so is the dream image built up. You can refer to our previous discussion on matter if it will help you here, but the dream world is not a formless, haphazard, semi-construction.
quotes.translation: 我曾说过，梦境世界有其自身的形态和持久性。它虽以物质为导向，但程度不及你们寻常宇宙所固有的。正如物质形象是由个体构建而成，梦境形象也是如此构建的。如果这对你有帮助，你可以参考我们之前关于物质的讨论，但梦境世界并非无形、随意、半成品的构造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

This takes the place of what you call space. It is a quality which makes all existences and consciousness possible. It is one of the most powerful principles behind or within the vitality that itself composes from itself all other phenomena.3

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones.
